query: UPDATE players SET gold = CAST(CAST(gold AS DECIMAL(20,2)) + 1000000 AS CHAR);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2d1S7viP934C9u9.root --database f39rghmcCDkVuc3rBX8cym --execute UPDATE players SET gold = CAST(CAST(gold AS DECIMAL(20,2)) + 1000000 AS CHAR);
